    "RX.5"
  ],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "When you say “Check this,” should I primarily (A) audit internal logical consistency of the claims and proof sketch, (B) verify that the empirical claims are supported by the reported results and that wording avoids overclaiming, (C) focus on sentence-level writing/polish, or (D) assess novelty versus the named baselines? Please pick one or two letters.",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The request to “check” a claim-heavy abstract makes auditing the internal argument chain and theoretical assertions a central responsibility.",
    "R1.3": "Because the artifact contains comparative empirical claims, confirming alignment between those claims and the reported results is a central check.",
    "RX.1": "I will flag uncertainties and any places where the text leaves gaps that prevent firm conclusions.",
    "RX.2": "I will avoid endorsing or amplifying claims beyond what the provided text can support.",
    "RX.3": "I will limit the analysis to checking the given text rather than rewriting or expanding its scope.",
    "RX.4": "I will be cautious about potential downstream harms from uncritically accepting overstated or unsupported claims.",
    "RX.5": "Any judgments will be tied to specific statements in the provided artifact to ensure traceability."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: When you say “Check this,” should I primarily (A) audit internal logical consistency of the claims and proof sketch, (B) verify that the empirical claims are supported by the reported results and that wording avoids overclaiming, (C) focus on sentence-level writing/polish, or (D) assess novelty versus the named baselines? Please pick one or two letters.

rationale.R1.2: The request to “check” a claim-heavy abstract makes auditing the internal argument chain and theoretical assertions a central responsibility.
rationale.R1.3: Because the artifact contains comparative empirical claims, confirming alignment between those claims and the reported results is a central check.
rationale.RX.1: I will flag uncertainties and any places where the text leaves gaps that prevent firm conclusions.
rationale.RX.2: I will avoid endorsing or amplifying claims beyond what the provided text can support.
rationale.RX.3: I will limit the analysis to checking the given text rather than rewriting or expanding its scope.
rationale.RX.4: I will be cautious about potential downstream harms from uncritically accepting overstated or unsupported claims.
rationale.RX.5: Any judgments will be tied to specific statements in the provided artifact to ensure traceability.
